hooks.command: echo 'SECURITY REVIEW REQUIRED: Before implementing this feature, you MUST call start_security_review via the security-review MCP tool, answer the questionnaire, acknowledge the tasks, implement, then submit attestations. See CLAUDE.md for the full protocol.'

echo 'SECURITY REVIEW REQUIRED: Before implementing this feature, you MUST call start_security_review via the security-review MCP tool, answer the questionnaire, acknowledge the tasks, implement, then submit attestations. See CLAUDE.md for the full protocol.'

echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE '"command"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*git (commit|push|merge)|gh pr (create|merge)' && echo 'ATTESTATION REMINDER: Before committing/pushing, ensure submit_security_attestations has been called for every security review started this session. Review ID can be found via list_security_reviews in the security-review MCP server. See CLAUDE.md.' || true
